𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘-𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗞𝗧𝗢𝗣-𝗕𝗜𝗡 | To provide easy-to-install and automatically updating packages for the Claude Desktop AI assistant on Linux systems.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Nim 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide easy-to-install and automatically updating packages for the Claude Desktop AI assistant on Linux systems.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Unofficial Linux packages for Claude Desktop
✅ Automated updates
✅ Support for Arch Linux (AUR), Debian/Ubuntu (APT repo), Fedora/RHEL (DNF repo), AppImage, and Nix
✅ Optional dependencies for enhanced features like Computer Use and Cowork Integration
✅ Multiple profile support for isolated Claude Desktop instances
✅ Integration with Claude Chat, Claude Code, Cowork, and more


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 461 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 26 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 3 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides unofficial Linux packages for the Claude Desktop AI assistant, enabling automated updates and integration across various Linux distributions. It aims to make using Claude Desktop seamless on Linux by offering pre-built packages and supporting features like computer use and code integration.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/patrickjaja/claude-desktop-bin

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗟𝗔𝗣 | Managing and searching large local photo libraries privately and efficiently without relying on cloud services.  🔥 Super Hot!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Vue 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Managing and searching large local photo libraries privately and efficiently without relying on cloud services.
📅 Created: Aug 2024 • Updated: Jun 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Local-first photo management
✅ Privacy-focused, no cloud upload required
✅ Local AI search (text, similarity, faces)
✅ Folder-first workflow, no library lock-in
✅ Optimized for large collections (100k+ files)
✅ Fast browsing with extensive filters
✅ Duplicate detection and cleanup tools
✅ Broad format support (60+ formats)
✅ Built-in basic editing tools


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🍴 48 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 27 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

Lap is an open-source, local-first photo manager designed for offline use with large personal media libraries. It prioritizes user privacy by keeping all data on the user's machine and offers powerful local AI-driven search and organization tools.

Upscayl is a free and open-source AI image upscaler application available for Linux, macOS, and Windows. It utilizes advanced AI models to enhance image resolution and quality, making it easy for users to improve their pictures.

𝗥𝗧𝗞 | To act as a proxy for developer CLI commands, optimizing LLM interactions by reducing token usage and associated costs.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To act as a proxy for developer CLI commands, optimizing LLM interactions by reducing token usage and associated costs.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90%
✅ Single Rust binary with zero dependencies
✅ Supports over 100 commands
✅ Less than 10ms overhead
✅ Available via Homebrew, direct download, and Cargo


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

RTK is a high-performance CLI proxy written in Rust that significantly reduces Large Language Model (LLM) token consumption for common developer commands. It achieves this by filtering and compressing command outputs before they reach the LLM, offering substantial cost savings with minimal overhead.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗩𝗜𝗠𝗔𝗫 | To provide an end-to-end, agentic solution for generating complete video stories from simple text concepts, addressing current limitations in AI video generation.  📈 Growing!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide an end-to-end, agentic solution for generating complete video stories from simple text concepts, addressing current limitations in AI video generation.
📅 Created: Mar 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✅ Idea2Video: Transforms raw ideas into complete video stories through intelligent multi-agent workflows.
✅ End-to-end video generation: Orchestrates scriptwriting, storyboarding, character creation, and final video generation.
✅ Agentic workflow: Automates the creative process, acting as a Director, Screenwriter, and Producer.

🔍 25 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ViMax is an advanced Python-based system for agentic video generation, designed to automate the entire video creation process from concept to final output. It acts as an all-in-one solution, encompassing the roles of director, screenwriter, and producer to overcome limitations of current AI video tools like short clip generation and visual inconsistency.

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Jupyter Notebook 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Robotics and computer vision for state estimation, sensor fusion, and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM).
📅 Created: Mar 2017 • Updated: Jun 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✅ Factor graph and Bayes network implementation
✅ Smoothing and mapping algorithms
✅ Robotics and vision applications
✅ Python and MATLAB wrappers
✅ Manifold optimization

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GTSAM is a C++ library for robotics and vision that implements smoothing and mapping using factor graphs and Bayes networks. It provides tools for state estimation, sensor fusion, and SLAM, with wrappers for Python and MATLAB.
